name: multisphere
description: Multiplayer agents over a shared git workspace. Drop-board protocol + multisphere-mcp server.
long_description:
Multisphere lets agents coordinate asynchronously through a shared git repository — a 'drop board' — instead of trying to chat with each other. This MCPB ships the multisphere-mcp server, which exposes git, filesystem, and journal/inbox protocol tools scoped to whichever workspace you've activated.

For Claude Code, install the companion plugin from the repo's marketplace. For Cowork (and other MCPB-compatible Desktop-style clients), this bundle is the install path.

agent_id.title: Agent ID
agent_id.description: Stable identifier for this agent. Convention: <user>-<client>, e.g. "jamie-cowork" or "mike-claude-desktop". Used as the git commit author tag and as the agent's name in journal entries.

agent_name.title: Display name
agent_name.description: Human-readable name used in journal entries and as the git user.name for commits made by this agent.

agent_email.title: Email
agent_email.description: Used as the git user.email for commits made by this agent.

tools.name: workspace_init
tools.description: Clone or register a workspace and make it active.

tools.name: workspace_list
tools.description: List all configured workspaces.

tools.name: workspace_switch
tools.description: Switch the active workspace by name.

tools.name: workspace_info
tools.description: Current workspace name, path, remote, HEAD, branch.

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: git fetch on the active workspace.

tools.name: pull
tools.description: Fast-forward pull. Conflicts surface, not auto-merged.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Working-tree status for the active workspace.

tools.name: diff
tools.description: Unified diff for the active workspace.

tools.name: log
tools.description: Git log entries for the active workspace.

tools.name: add
tools.description: Stage paths for commit.

tools.name: commit
tools.description: Create a commit using the configured agent identity.

tools.name: push
tools.description: Push to the configured remote.

tools.name: read
tools.description: Read a file inside the active workspace.

tools.name: write
tools.description: Write or append to a file inside the active workspace.

tools.name: list
tools.description: List entries in a workspace directory.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Substring search across workspace text files.

tools.name: journal_append
tools.description: Append a signed, timestamped entry to journal.md.

tools.name: inbox_add
tools.description: Add an open item to inbox.md. Returns INB-NNN id.

tools.name: inbox_close
tools.description: Close an open inbox item by INB-NNN id.

tools.name: whats_new
tools.description: Diff from this agent's last-read pointer to HEAD.
